meta.title: Colocation | Cloud Host
meta.description: Enterprise colocation services with Tier-3 facilities, redundant power, and 24/7 monitoring.

sections.headline: Your Server. Your Rack.
sections.description: Securely house your infrastructure in our Tier-3 facilities. Experience 100% uptime, 24/7 onsite monitoring, and ultra-high bandwidth with redundant power systems.

image.alt: Futuristic data center interior with glowing server racks

sections.heading: Custom Rack or Full Rack?
sections.description: Need more space or specific power requirements? Our team can design a bespoke colocation solution for your enterprise growth.

sections.heading: World-Class Data Center Facilities
sections.description: We prioritize reliability and security above all else. Our facilities are designed to exceed enterprise standards.

items.title: Always Online
items.description: Redundant N+1 UPS systems backed by industrial-grade diesel generators ensure your servers never lose power.

items.title: Power Redundancy
items.description: Dual power feeds (A+B) are available for all rack spaces, providing ultimate fault tolerance for critical loads.

items.title: Precision Cooling
items.description: Advanced CRAC units maintain optimal temperature and humidity levels using cold-aisle containment technology.

items.title: Multi-Homed Network
items.description: Connected to multiple Tier-1 upstream providers and major Internet Exchanges for low-latency routing.

items.title: Physical Security
items.description: 24/7 onsite security personnel, biometric access control, and high-definition CCTV monitoring of all zones.

items.title: Remote Hands 24/7
items.description: Professional technicians available around the clock for reboots, cable swaps, and basic hardware troubleshooting.

steps.title: Pick and Order
steps.description: Select the rack unit size and power specifications that fit your server hardware.

steps.title: Ship Server
steps.description: Ship your hardware to our data center or visit us for a scheduled installation with our team.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: Our engineers rack and stack your equipment, configure the network, and you are online.

items.question: What is colocation server?
items.answer: Colocation is a service where you provide your own server hardware, and we provide the physical space, power, cooling, and high-speed internet connectivity in our Tier-3 data center. It allows you to maintain full control over your hardware while leveraging enterprise-grade infrastructure.

items.question: How to access my server?
items.answer: You can access your server remotely via SSH, RDP, or IPMI/iDRAC/KVM. For physical maintenance, you can schedule a visit to our data center during business hours or utilize our 24/7 Remote Hands service for urgent tasks.

items.question: Can I add IP addresses?
items.answer: Yes, additional IP addresses can be requested at any time. We offer both single IPs and larger subnets (/29, /28, etc.) depending on your technical requirements and justification.

sections.heading: Ready to Colocate Your Server?
sections.description: Join hundreds of enterprises that trust Cloud Host for their mission-critical infrastructure.
